g.title: public.chats:user_id->public.users:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.personas:chat_id->public.chats:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (chat_id) REFERENCES chats(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.chat_participants:chat_id->public.chats:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (chat_id) REFERENCES chats(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.messages:chat_id->public.chats:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (chat_id) REFERENCES chats(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.insights:chat_id->public.chats:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (chat_id) REFERENCES chats(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
